headline: Danaher Could Swing Over $7 Billion in Value After Earnings
summary: Earnings are back in focus on Tuesday, with a Benzinga-selected slate including Danaher Corp. (NYSE:DHR). Options pricing reveals traders are bracing for volatility, with Annaly Capital Management (NYSE:NLY) and The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE:SCHW) reporting. Both stocks have seen positive analyst ratings and are trading above their 200-day moving averages.

headline: Week ahead: Wall Street gears up for volatility as Big Tech earnings kick into high gear
summary: Wall Street heads into a pivotal week with investors preparing for a flood of corporate earnings, major artificial intelligence announcements and lingering geopolitical tensions that have pushed oil prices above $90 a barrel. headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
